subdomain.label: Subdomain
subdomain.description: The unique subdomain Salesforce Marketing Cloud assigned to your account. Subdomains are tenant specific and should be a 28-character string starting with the letters "mc". Do not include the .rest.marketingcloudapis.com part of your subdomain URL. See more information on how to find your subdomain [here](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/marketing/marketing-cloud/guide/your-subdomain-tenant-specific-endpoints.html).

account_id.label: Account ID
account_id.description: Your Salesforce Marketing Cloud account identifier (or MID). See more information on how to find your MID [here](https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.mc_overview_determine_your_marketing_cloud_instance.htm&type=5).

client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.description: Your Salesforce Marketing Cloud client ID. The client ID is issued when you create an API integration in [Installed Packages](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/marketing/marketing-cloud/guide/install-packages.html).

client_secret.label: Client Secret
client_secret.description: Your Salesforce Marketing Cloud client secret. The client secret is issued when you create an API integration in Installed Packages.

contact.title: Create Contact
contact.description: Create contacts in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

contactKey.label: Contact Key
contactKey.description: The unique identifier that you assign to a contact. This will be used to create a contact if one does not already exist with this Contact Key.

dataExtension.title: Send Event to Data Extension
dataExtension.description: Upsert events as rows into an existing data extension in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

key.label: Data Extension Key
key.description: The external key of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The external key is required if a Data Extension ID is not provided.

id.label: Data Extension ID
id.description: The ID of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The ID is required if a Data Extension Key is not provided.

keys.label: Data Extension Primary Key
keys.description: The Primary Key is a unique identifier for each row in the Data Extension. In the mapping configuration, enter the SFMC Key Name on the left and map the corresponding Segment Field on the right. Each Data Extension supports only one Primary Key. When data is sent to SFMC, the system will update an existing row if the Primary Key matches; otherwise, it will create a new record.

values.label: Data Extension Fields
values.description: The fields in the data extension that contain data about an event, such as Product Name, Revenue, Event Time, etc. Fields must be created in the data extension before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the data extension. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

enable_batching.label: Batch data to SFMC
enable_batching.description: If true, data is batched before sending to the SFMC Data Extension.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

contactDataExtension.title: Send Contact to Data Extension
contactDataExtension.description: Upsert contact data as rows into an existing data extension in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

key.label: Data Extension Key
key.description: The external key of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The external key is required if a Data Extension ID is not provided.

id.label: Data Extension ID
id.description: The ID of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The ID is required if a Data Extension Key is not provided.

keys.label: Data Extension Primary Key
keys.description: The Primary Key is a unique identifier for each row in the Data Extension. In the mapping configuration, enter the SFMC Key Name on the left and map the corresponding Segment Field on the right. Each Data Extension supports only one Primary Key. When data is sent to SFMC, the system will update an existing row if the Primary Key matches; otherwise, it will create a new record.

contactKey.label: Contact Key
contactKey.description: The unique identifier that you assign to a contact. Contact Key must be a Primary Key in the data extension that contains contact information.

values.label: Contact Fields
values.description: The fields in the data extension that contain data about a contact, such as Email, Last Name, etc. Fields must be created in the data extension before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the data extension. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

enable_batching.label: Batch data to SFMC
enable_batching.description: If true, data is batched before sending to the SFMC Data Extension.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

apiEvent.title: Send API Event
apiEvent.description: Send events into an existing Event Definition in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

eventDefinitionKey.label: Event Definition Key
eventDefinitionKey.description: The unique key for an event definition in Salesforce Marketing Cloud. The event defintion must be predefined in SFMC.

contactKey.label: Contact Key
contactKey.description: The unique identifier that identifies a subscriber or a contact.

data.label: Event Data
data.description: The properties of the event. Fields must be created in the event definition schema before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the event definition schema. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

dataExtensionV2.title: Send Event to Data Extension (V2)
dataExtensionV2.description: Upsert events as rows into a data extension in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

retlOnMappingSave.label: Create or Select Data Extension
retlOnMappingSave.description: Connect to an existing data extension or create a new one in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

operation.label: Operation
operation.description: Whether to create a new data extension or select an existing one for data delivery.

dataExtensionId.label: Data Extension ID
dataExtensionId.description: The identifier for the data extension.

categoryId.label: Category ID (Folder ID)
categoryId.description: The identifier for the folder that contains the data extension.

name.label: Data Extension Name
name.description: The name of the data extension.

description.label: Data Extension Description
description.description: The description of the data extension.

isSendable.label: Is Sendable
isSendable.description: Indicates whether the custom object can be used to send messages. If the value of this property is true, then the custom object is sendable

sendableCustomObjectField.label: Sendable Custom Object Field
sendableCustomObjectField.description: The field on this data extension which is sendable. This must be a field that is present on this data extension.

sendableSubscriberField.label: Sendable Subscriber Field
sendableSubscriberField.description: The relationship with "Subscribers" for the Sendable Custom Object Field.

columns.label: Data Extension Fields
columns.description: A list of fields to create in the data extension.

type.label: Field Type
type.description: The data type of the field.

isNullable.label: Is Nullable
isNullable.description: Whether the field can be null.

isPrimaryKey.label: Is Primary Key
isPrimaryKey.description: Whether the field is a primary key.

length.label: Field Length
length.description: The length of the field. Required for non-boolean fields

scale.label: Decimal Scale
scale.description: The scale of the field. Required for Decimal fields

id.label: Data Extension ID
id.description: The identifier for the data extension.

name.label: Data Extension Name
name.description: The name of the data extension.

asyncDataExtension.title: Send Event asynchronously to Data Extension
asyncDataExtension.description:
Upsert event records asynchronously as rows into a data extension in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
  
    Note that Segment cannot provide real-time delivery confirmation or error tracking for events sent through this action- That will come in near future
